name: Qualified Accelerated Death Benefit Rider Exclusion

eligibility.description: The rider must meet the requirements of section 101(g) and not be treated as a long-term care insurance contract under section 7702B.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Treats qualified accelerated death benefit riders as life insurance, allowing payments made to terminally or chronically ill individuals to be excluded from gross income.
